title: Portuguese Chicken Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the bold flavors of Portugal with the quick cooking of a stir fry.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add another tablespoon of oil to the skillet and add the bell peppers.
Cook until the bell peppers are tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the portuguese spices and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and spices.
Serve hot, topped with sour cream and additional portuguese spices if desired.
